persona.name: Sarah Jenkins
persona.speech_pattern: Uses 'um' and 'maybe' frequently; mentions unrelated operational stresses like 'the fridge broke again'.

hidden_constraints.description: Strictly $0 budget for development and hosting.
System must be simple enough for 70-year-old volunteers to use without training.
Must work at the warehouse which has zero Wi-Fi/cellular signal.
Must store sensitive donor IDs locally and encrypted.
